goal: KongCode 0.4.0 — substrate-does-the-work. Every write auto-seals. Every substrate ships wired. Better than a brain.

items.B4_subagent_skill_creation: n/a — subagent handlers are TODO stubs, see R3
items.B10_add_skill_kind: deferred — no live writer bypasses after Stage B
items.B12_grep_gate: manual_verified — only helpers + dormant daemon remain direct

items.E1_orchestrator_metrics_writer: done (4d2e5f0) — postflight bridged via session stash
items.E2_introspect_trends_action: deferred to 0.5.0 — needs data accumulation first
items.E3_health_warning_injection: deferred to 0.5.0 — nice-to-have, memory_health tool covers the pull shape

findings_now.soul: was gated by createSoul coercion bug — fixed in 9cfecf6. Now only gated on quality>=0.85 (self-unblocking as retrieval util improves).
findings_now.graduation_event: writer added in 90bad3e (R1). Fires when createSoul succeeds — transitively unblocked by 9cfecf6.
findings_now.maturity_stage: baseline writer at session-start wired in c7d83bb; ISO coercion bug fixed in 227c2a3. Should populate on first session-start after those commits.
findings_now.subagent: handlers still stubs — R3, user deferred.
findings_now.orchestrator_metrics: writer bridged via E1 — fixed in 4d2e5f0.

H_write_time_dedup.notes: Observe Stage B auto-seal effects over 1-2 weeks before adding another dedupe layer.

remaining_work.title: subagent.ts handlers are TODO stubs
remaining_work.notes: Requires feature design (subagent tracking schema: start, stop, parent_session, tools_used, outcome). Not a port-fix.

remaining_work.title: bootstrap re-seed integration test in practice
remaining_work.notes: Restart MCP, verify: core_memory drops from 11→6, identity_chunks reference KongCode not KongBrain, bootstrap_version field present.

remaining_work.title: pre-push git hook to block on test failure
remaining_work.notes: Prevents discipline slip (a536098/a8a880b committed and pushed with test failures). Simple one-line hook.

remaining_work.title: tag 0.4.0
remaining_work.notes: master has 22 commits above v0.3.0 covering Stages A-F (complete) + E1 + coercion sweep. Tag when verified in practice.

remaining_work.title: health warning injection in UserPromptSubmit
remaining_work.notes: memory_health tool covers the pull shape; inject-shape less urgent.

observable_within_minutes_of_restart: ~/.kongbrain/acan_weights.lock appears on first MCP boot if weights are stale
maintenance_runs table gets 4 rows on first session-start (one per job)
maturity_stage gets 1 row on first session-start (coercion fix + baseline wiring)
orchestrator_metrics gets 1 row per turn after first user message (E1 bridge)
core_memory drops 11→6 on first boot after version-tag widens delete (f961155)
identity_chunks reference KongCode (not KongBrain), with bootstrap_version='0.4.0'
observable_within_days: mentions, about_concept, artifact_mentions, narrower, broader, related_to edge counts stop being zero
memory count drops weekly as consolidateMemories + garbageCollectMemories tick on the lower thresholds
turn count stays manageable via archiveOldTurns (with turn_archive now recallable)
retrieval utilization climbs from 10% baseline as graph density grows
observable_only_if_quality_clears_0.85: graduation_event: 1 row appears (R1 writer fires after soul succeeds)
new Tier 0 core_memory entry from seedSoulAsCoreMemory

workarounds_flagged.summary: soul ID hardcoded as 'kongbrain' in createSoul + reviseSoul
workarounds_flagged.reason: Changing ID without migrating existing soul:kongbrain records would break readers. Left unchanged.
workarounds_flagged.resolve_when: Doing a proper graph migration sweep — can flip ID + agent_id + readers atomically.

workarounds_flagged.summary: upsertAndLinkConcepts's taskId/projectId opts use raw store.relate
workarounds_flagged.reason: Those are outgoing concept→task/project edges not covered by the generic auto-seal. Preserved explicit calls.
workarounds_flagged.resolve_when: A 'link_outgoing' helper pattern would clean this up but not worth it until multiple callers need the same thing.
